name: PostmanBootstrap
description: Bootstrap a Postman workspace, API spec, and test collections from an OpenAPI specification.
author: Postman CSE

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Service project name used to name the Postman workspace and collections.

inputs.name: spec_url
inputs.label: Spec URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: HTTPS URL to the OpenAPI document to bootstrap.

inputs.name: postman_api_key
inputs.label: Postman API Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Postman API key. **Store as a secret.** Reference from a secret pipeline variable or Key Vault-linked variable group, e.g. `$(POSTMAN-API-KEY)`.

inputs.name: postman_access_token
inputs.label: Postman Access Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Postman access token for governance and workspace mutations. **Store as a secret.** e.g. `$(POSTMAN-ACCESS-TOKEN)`.

inputs.name: workspace_id
inputs.label: Workspace ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Existing Postman workspace ID to reuse across runs.

inputs.name: spec_id
inputs.label: Spec ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Existing Postman spec ID to update instead of creating a new one.

inputs.name: baseline_collection_id
inputs.label: Baseline Collection ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Existing baseline collection ID to refresh in place.

inputs.name: smoke_collection_id
inputs.label: Smoke Collection ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Existing smoke collection ID to refresh in place.

inputs.name: contract_collection_id
inputs.label: Contract Collection ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Existing contract collection ID to refresh in place.

inputs.name: release_label
inputs.label: Release Label
inputs.helpMarkDown: Release label for versioned specs and collections (e.g. a tag or branch name).

inputs.name: domain
inputs.label: Domain
inputs.helpMarkDown: Business domain for the service, used for governance group assignment.

inputs.name: domain_code
inputs.label: Domain Code
inputs.helpMarkDown: Short prefix used in workspace naming, e.g. `PLAT`.

inputs.name: requester_email
inputs.label: Requester Email
inputs.helpMarkDown: Requester email address for audit context.

inputs.name: workspace_admin_user_ids
inputs.label: Workspace Admin User IDs
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated Postman user IDs to add as workspace admins.

inputs.name: workspace_team_id
inputs.label: Workspace Team ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Numeric sub-team ID for org-mode workspace creation. Required when the API key belongs to an org with multiple sub-teams.

inputs.name: governance_mapping_json
inputs.label: Governance Mapping JSON
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON map of business domain to governance group name.

inputs.name: sync_examples
inputs.label: Sync Examples
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable example syncing between the linked spec and collections.

inputs.name: nested_folder_hierarchy
inputs.label: Nested Folder Hierarchy
inputs.helpMarkDown: When folder strategy is Tags, enables nested folder hierarchy.

inputs.name: collection_sync_mode
inputs.label: Collection Sync Mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Collection lifecycle policy.

inputs.name: spec_sync_mode
inputs.label: Spec Sync Mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Spec lifecycle policy.

inputs.name: folder_strategy
inputs.label: Folder Strategy
inputs.helpMarkDown: Folder organisation strategy for generated collections.

inputs.name: request_name_source
inputs.label: Request Name Source
inputs.helpMarkDown: How requests are named in generated collections.

inputs.name: openapi_version
inputs.label: OpenAPI Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: OpenAPI version override. Leave blank for auto-detection.

inputs.name: integration_backend
inputs.label: Integration Backend
inputs.helpMarkDown: Integration backend for downstream workspace connectivity.

outputVariables.name: lintSummaryJson
outputVariables.description: JSON summary of lint errors and warnings
